markdownRemark.html:
I was the lead developer on Resource Guru’s slick new JavaScript calendar, written using Backbone.js. On Saturday 29 June 2013 I gave a presentation at the JSinSA conference in Midrand, South Africa, giving a case study of some of the experiences we found and solutions we found to some pretty complex problems along the way.

Slides are available for download
